title: Modern Moroccan Kitchen
summary: Modern kitchen design with Moroccan heritage touch, using finest wood types with elegant gold finishing. Features practical storage spaces and integrated LED lighting.

title: Royal Bedroom
summary: Luxurious bedroom with gold finishing and intricate hand-made details. Includes built-in wardrobe and decorated bedside table.

summary: Reception hall with modern design combining elegance and comfort. Features built-in TV unit and display shelves.

title: Open Kitchen
summary: Open kitchen to the living room with modern contemporary design. Features central island and organized storage spaces.

summary: Artistic decor piece with hand-carved Moroccan patterns. Ideal for decorating living room or entrance walls.

title: Classic Cabinet
summary: Classic cabinet with modern design combining heritage and contemporary. Features adjustable shelves and glass doors.

summary: Elegant French door with transparent glass providing natural light while maintaining privacy.

summary: Luxury master bedroom with high-end finishing and custom furniture.

summary: Elegant interior door providing privacy while maintaining design aesthetics.
